root_cause_summary: The AMF became unreachable; the gNB lost its NGAP/N2 (SCTP) association, so NG setup retries failed and new UE registrations were rejected.

causal_chain.event: AMF becomes unreachable (process down / N2 reset)
gNB loses SCTP/NGAP association to the AMF
DU sees UE attach attempts stall after RA
NG setup retries fail; no AMF available

recommended_actions: Check the AMF process health and the N2 SCTP association.
Verify the gNB's AMF IP/port config and network reachability.
Restore the AMF, then confirm NG Setup succeeds.
